transcript: Speaker A: Talk like a Baddie, I speak Black, you speak Red. I didn't like your clothes. Haha, I was kidding. Not at all. By the way, I heard you're dating somebody. Chill, do you want to hang out? You can practice speaking English in real-life situations with an AI partner like me, anytime, and get instant feedback on your pronunciation and fluency to improve faster. This app is MySivi app, your English learning partner. The trial is just 1 rupee. Click on the link to download.
on_screen_text:
Talk like a Baddie, I speak Black, you speak Red.
I didn't like your clothes.
I feel the same about your clothes; in fact, your clothes are too old-fashioned.
Haha, I was kidding.
So was I. I hope you didn't mind that, did you?
Not at all. By the way, I heard you're dating somebody.
How about you mind your own business and not ask personal questions.
Chill, do you want to hang out?
No, I have my own plans, I am running late. Bye.
You can practice speaking English in real-life situations with an AI partner like me, anytime, and get instant feedback on your pronunciation and fluency to improve faster. This app is MySivi app, your English learning partner. The trial is just 1 rupee.
Click on the link to download.
summary: An AI avatar leads an interactive English roleplay exercise where the viewer reads the red text. She then introduces the MySivi app as a tool for practicing English in real-life situations with instant feedback. The ad concludes with a call to download the app for a 1-rupee trial.
